# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Report security issues privately using [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/nabisys/nabi/security/advisories/new). This creates a private channel between you and the maintainer.

If you prefer email, contact `security@nabi.run` with the subject line `Nabi Security`. Please include the word "security" so the report can be prioritized.

### What to include

- A description of the vulnerability and its impact.
- Steps to reproduce, ideally a minimal code example.
- The Nabi version(s) affected.
- Any proof-of-concept code, if available.

### What to expect

- Acknowledgment of the report within 72 hours.
- A coordinated disclosure timeline agreed with the reporter.
- Credit in the release notes and advisory, unless anonymity is requested.

Please allow a reasonable window for investigation and patching before any public disclosure.

## Supported Versions

Nabi is pre-1.0 and under active development. Only the latest published minor version on [crates.io](https://crates.io/crates/nabi) receives security fixes. Earlier versions are not supported.

Once Nabi reaches 1.0, this policy will be updated to cover a defined support window.
